changes.crest_policy: One crest per team on primary match cards; no automatic crest decoration in dense Community lists, leaderboards, tables or engine grids.
changes.league_flags: Country flags remain available on league labels and card metadata.
changes.duplicate_guard: Existing crest images are detected before runtime decoration.
changes.community_layout: Top picks and popular slip align in a responsive feature grid; cards, filters and headings use one visual system.
changes.community_board: 12 picks initially on phones, 20 on larger screens, with Show more and Show fewer controls.
changes.navigation: Removed the Community-only duplicate mobile navigation; global navigation remains.
changes.brand_green: Community green tokens and translucent accents use #77C41C / RGB 119,196,28.

static_validation.html_duplicate_ids: passed for community.html, index.html and board.html

browser_execution: New Playwright tests are included but were not executed in this sandbox. GitHub Actions should run the complete browser matrix after deployment.
